archon_thanis:idle.greeting: Archon Thanis is seated on the cracked throne of the Ruined Court, half-mask shadowed. "Walker. You have arrived, as predicted, in the tense the present does not name."

nodes.npcText: "What did you come bringing? The Court accepts gifts only of one kind."

playerOptions.text: A glyph from Oracle Nesha in the hub.
I came to understand the rite of refusal.

nodes.npcText: He extends his hand. The fingers are pale. "Show it."

He studies it for a long moment. "She has been working on the same glyph for forty years. She is close. Tell her she is close. Carry this back: a fragment of the same shape, half a layer further along. We do not speak directly, but our work converges."
"The rite refuses. That is its whole content. To refuse death, harvest, hostility, consequence, numbers, the dome, the win. It is the strongest grammar I know."
"You already have. The lattice taught you when you arrived. You have refused things you did not know you refused. The rite only makes the refusal visible."

He inclines his head. "Then listen. Three centuries have passed since the Court was unburned. Six since it was unhated. One since it was unbroken. I count them in the wrong tense because the present has not yet decided which it is."
The half-mask tilts slightly. "Walk back through the time you came from."

rebel_calla_bren:idle.greeting: Calla Bren is checking the edge of her sword against the lamplight. She does not look up. "Walker. Sit. Talk fast or talk slow; I'm not particular."

nodes.npcText: "You came into a rebel camp. Either you're brave or stupid. Both can be useful."

playerOptions.text: Voss Dren in the Crucible. I know about the pact.
I want to help the rebellion.
Iyatte of Sandrun met you in a tavern as girls.

nodes.npcText: She sets the sword down. "Voss is a careful man. He doesn't talk loosely. How did you learn?"

playerOptions.text: His niece Kit said too much.

nodes.npcText: "Kit. Damn. I'll have words with Voss. The pact is real. If you carry messages between us, we'll know about it within the day, both ends. Carry well."
"Then Voss trusts you more than I would on first meeting. He is a careful man; I'll give him the benefit. Don't make me wrong about you."
"Then run a message to Zaen Drift, the Court champion. Tell him: the southern arc is thinning. He'll know which arc."
Her hand stills. "That was a long time ago, in a tavern that no longer stands. Who told you?"

playerOptions.text: I worked it out from old letters.

nodes.npcText: "Then you read more than you should have. Iyatte and I parted on terms neither of us is proud of. If you ever stand in front of her, don't bring me up. Promise."
She picks up the sword again. "Walk light. Come back if you do."
